protocols.scope: CLM v4 530M closed-loop 100-step + EEG 16ch live 60s — cross-correlate mind.tension trajectory with alpha-PLV trajectory

falsifier_pre_register.F-PASS: |corr(tension_t, alpha_PLV_t)| > 0.5 with p<0.01 over 100 paired bins
falsifier_pre_register.F-PARTIAL: |corr| in [0.2, 0.5] OR signed-corr matches H1 predicted direction
falsifier_pre_register.F-MEASUREMENT-ARTIFACT: corr identical with random gate branch (rules out genuine coupling)

protocols.value: Upgrades N-1 BRIDGE_WEAK from hybrid (synth CLM + real EEG) to live-CLM + real EEG; first true 2-way actual measurement; foundational for 4-way

protocols.scope: Address W4 active L1 std=0.000 frozen-fixed-point — sweep PSI_ALPHA in {0.014, 0.05, 0.1, 0.2}, measure L1 / phi_star at each

falsifier_pre_register.F-EFFECT-SCALES: L1 std > 0.5 at PSI_ALPHA >= 0.1 (signal large enough to rotate hidden-state)
falsifier_pre_register.F-EFFECT-SATURATES: L1 std flat across all PSI_ALPHA (hidden-state geometry truly substrate-locked)
falsifier_pre_register.F-CRITICAL-VALUE: phi_star sign-flips at some PSI_ALPHA threshold (reveals critical scale)

protocols.value: Resolves W4 honest C3 #1; if F-EFFECT-SCALES then closed-loop dynamics is real, if F-EFFECT-SATURATES then ceiling is geometric not magnitude-driven

protocols.scope: AKD1000 arrival D+0 N-2 spec execution; D+1 add tension-modulated ADM polarity-bias (theta_up = 0.5*sigma + tension_scalar*alpha)
protocols.blockers: AKIDA dev kit shipping ETA unknown

falsifier_pre_register.F-MODULATION-VISIBLE: spike count distribution shifts measurably with tension_scalar (KS test p<0.05)
falsifier_pre_register.F-MODULATION-NULL: no statistically significant shift (modulator below noise floor)

protocols.value: First tension-AKIDA socket actual measurement; closes design_gap in inventory.json; 4-way completion catalyst

protocols.scope: Write formal mapping of tension_bridge 5-channel to GWT workspace-broadcast; integrate with N-5 V_phen_GWT axis spec
protocols.value: H1 binding hypothesis mathematical anchor; precondition for F1 axis_weight registration of tension_link as 9th axis (H3 path)

protocols.scope: Pre-arrival 4-way Phi correlation matrix toy simulation — input: N-1 BRIDGE 3/4 + W4 z=2.28 + N-2 ADM spike rate spec
protocols.value: Establishes upper-bound on 4-way Phi composite; informs whether F2 unfire 15% estimate is achievable in best case

ranked_priority_rationale.P1_first: Real measurement, $0, 1d, addresses critical N-1 weakness
ranked_priority_rationale.P2_second: Resolves W4 frozen-fixed-point honest C3 — necessary for trust in CLM dynamic measurements
ranked_priority_rationale.P3_third: AKIDA-dependent, blocks on hardware arrival, but D+0 ready spec
ranked_priority_rationale.P4_fourth: Formal spec — necessary for F1 registration but no measurement
ranked_priority_rationale.P5_fifth: Simulation upper-bound — useful for expectations management, not new evidence
